basic_details.job_title: BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 39 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Block Mission Management Unit Kanchipuram (BMMU Kanchipuram)
basic_details.short_information: Block Mission Management Unit Kanchipuram (BMMU Kanchipuram) Community Bank Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 39 vacancies have been announced through the BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have passed 12th Pass and are Woman SHG Members from Village Level Federation with required experience are eligible to apply for these Community Bank Coordinator vacancies. The offline application process for BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing and w

qualification.details: Must be a woman SHG member from village level federation. Minimum 2 years experience as SHG motivator. 12th pass with good Tamil and English reading/writing and arithmetic skills. Must be resident of the concerned village panchayat. No NPA in SHG. Communication skills and banking transaction experience required. Preference for computer knowledge and two-wheeler driving license.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Co-ordinator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Co-ordinator recruitment is 03 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Community Bank Co-ordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 39 vacancies announced for the Community Bank Co-ordinator position by the Block Mission Management Unit Kanchipuram.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th grade and be a woman SHG member from a village-level federation with at least 2 years of experience as an SHG motivator.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Community Bank Co-ordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 2500 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the BMMU Kanchipuram recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the BMMU Kanchipuram Community Bank Co-ordinator posts is offline.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential skills required for the Community Bank Co-ordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates need good Tamil and English reading/writing and arithmetic skills, communication skills, and banking transaction experience. Computer knowledge and a two-wheeler driving license are preferred.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of BMMU Kanchipuram, links for which are provided in the Important Links section of this article.
